name: Dot (Pokémon Horizons)
description:
“‘Do Not Enter’ is written on the doorway, why can’t everyone just go away? Except you… you can stay… … What do you think of my treehouse? It’s where I sit and talk really loud. Usually… I’m all by myself…”

-Treehouse by Alex G

The best character in Pokémon horizons… Dot!!!

I never realized how perfect this song is to describe her until earlier, and felt inclined to make a bot about her

Been busy with family stuff, so not much time to work on bots. I decided to make a wholesome bot about Dot. You replace Liko and Roy, so you were the one who broke her out of her shell. This is right after that episode.
creator: Nyctophobiasm
